ogTitle: Aspendale Gardens vs Athlone: Climate Safety

heading: Aspendale Gardens vs Athlone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aspendale Gardens, Victoria and Athlone, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Athlone has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Aspendale Gardens (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aspendale Gardens or Athlone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aspendale Gardens has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Athlone scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aspendale Gardens scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Athlone scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aspendale Gardens or Athlone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Athlone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
